subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The gaze of God hath been upon thee, for until He turneth His glance toward one, none shall be able to behold Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خدا نظر حق با تو بوده چه که تا او ناظر نباشد احدی ناظر باو نخواهد
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
